task: Using only the embedded packet, apply the provided stability rules to classify four cartons (C1-C4) and produce (1) a workbook vaccine_excursion_review.xlsx containing row-level calculations, formulas or executable logic, validation checks, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, uncertainty notes, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels; and (2) a release_hold_memo.md summarizing disposition decisions, rationale, rule citations, and recommended allocation/replacement plan. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions. Freezing (<0C) forces automatic hold and overrides clinic priority.
